title: Smooth billable package open + faster copies
description:
After Create billable package, PipeShare no longer hard-refreshes the whole page. It soft-switches to the Customer folder, patches in the new package tree immediately, and keeps the view stable without Ctrl+Shift+R.

Copies are faster: more parallel Wasabi CopyObject workers, skip existence HeadObject on clone-only copies, and the transfer queue no longer forces an extra full tree reload that blanked the package view.

Who is affected: PipeShare billable packaging and Employee↔Customer folder switching on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Open billable package with soft job switch — no full page reload.
Show Customer package folder immediately via shallow tree patch.
Skip transfer-queue full-tree reload after billable copy (prevents blank/flicker).
Raise Wasabi folder copy concurrency; skip HeadObject on copyOnly clones.
Soft-switch Folder System Employee/Customer picker without hard refresh.
